creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Armin Pirkovitsch (sperber@freebsd.org) wrote:

> Could you please resubmit the patch as diff instead of a shar?

It's obvious that shell archive consists of multiple diff files.
I've submitted not a few PRs in such form when each ports have to
be updated simultaneously, and no particular complaint from other
ports developers have been received.

Unless what you need would be something like simply connected diff
files with /bin/cat, I'd appreciate it if you could show detailed
instructions in order to satisfy the conditions you've suggested.
